"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E vs_link_exe --msvc-ver=1950 --intdir=CMakeFiles\my_app.dir --rc=C:\PROGRA~2\WI3CF2~1\10\bin\100261~1.0\x64\rc.exe --mt=C:\PROGRA~2\WI3CF2~1\10\bin\100261~1.0\x64\mt.exe --manifests -- C:\PROGRA~2\MICROS~3\18\BUILDT~1\VC\Tools\MSVC\1450~1.357\bin\Hostx64\x64\link.exe /nologo @CMakeFiles\my_app.dir\objects1.rsp  /out:my_app.exe /implib:my_app.lib /pdb:C:\code\Amazon\build\my_app.pdb /version:0.0 /machine:x64 /debug /INCREMENTAL /subsystem:console  core_logic.lib C:\code\Amazon\SFML\lib\sfml-graphics-d.lib C:\code\Amazon\SFML\lib\sfml-window-d.lib C:\code\Amazon\SFML\lib\sfml-system-d.lib kernel32.lib user32.lib gdi32.lib winspool.lib shell32.lib ole32.lib oleaut32.lib uuid.lib comdlg32.lib advapi32.lib
